displayTitle: Return of the Jedi: The Rebellion #1
synopsis:
Is a one-shot canon comic in the Marvel Comics Return of the Jedi  One-Shot Miniseries.
THE 40TH ANNIVERSARY CELEBRATION OF RETURN OF THE JEDI
MON MOTHMA MUST DIE!
ADMIRAL ACKBAR is the only one with the knowledge of THE EMPIRE's plans to kill Mon Mothma.
Enter POE DAMERON's parents, SHARA BEY and KES DAMERON, to thwart the threat!
But do they have what it takes to take down the unknown assassin in time?
title: Return of the Jedi: The Rebellion #1
